title: Purely Roasted German Haricot Beans Grill
description: A light German dish featuring roasted haricot beans, perfect for a vegetarian-friendly meal, with a rich umami flavor and a shaggy texture, cooked to perfection on a raclette-grill
instructions: Preheat the raclette-grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Rinse the dried haricot beans and soak them in water for at least 8 hours
Drain and rinse the soaked haricot beans
In a bowl, mix together the chopped onion, minced garlic, caraway seeds, salt, black pepper, and paprika
Add the olive oil to the bowl and stir until the ingredients are well combined
Add the haricot beans to the bowl and stir until they are evenly coated with the onion mixture
Place the haricot bean mixture on the raclette-grill and roast for 20 minutes
Stir the haricot beans and continue to roast for an additional 10 minutes
Remove the haricot beans from the grill and serve hot
